mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, pool_code AS poolCode, pool_name AS poolName, pool_type AS poolType, pool_level AS poolLevel, market_codes AS marketCodes, variety_codes AS varietyCodes, hs_pool_name AS hsPoolName, in_flow_id AS inFlowId, in_flow_key AS inFlowKey, in_flow_name AS inFlowName, out_flow_id AS outFlowId, out_flow_key AS outFlowKey, out_flow_name AS outFlowName, simple_in_flow_id AS simpleInFlowId, simple_in_flow_key AS simpleInFlowKey, simple_in_flow_name AS simpleInFlowName, simple_out_flow_id AS simpleOutFlowId, simple_out_flow_key AS simpleOutFlowKey, simple_out_flow_name AS simpleOutFlowName, batch_in_flow_id AS batchInFlowId, batch_in_flow_key AS batchInFlowKey, batch_in_flow_name AS batchInFlowName, batch_out_flow_id AS batchOutFlowId, batch_out_flow_key AS batchOutFlowKey, batch_out_flow_name AS batchOutFlowName, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, outer_sort AS outerSort, inner_sort AS innerSort, description, status, is_deleted AS isDeleted, crte_time AS crteTime, updt_time AS updtTime FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY outer_sort ASC, parent_id ASC, inner_sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, pool_code AS poolCode, pool_name AS poolName, pool_type AS poolType, pool_level AS poolLevel, market_codes AS marketCodes, variety_codes AS varietyCodes, hs_pool_name AS hsPoolName, in_flow_id AS inFlowId, in_flow_key AS inFlowKey, in_flow_name AS inFlowName, out_flow_id AS outFlowId, out_flow_key AS outFlowKey, out_flow_name AS outFlowName, simple_in_flow_id AS simpleInFlowId, simple_in_flow_key AS simpleInFlowKey, simple_in_flow_name AS simpleInFlowName, simple_out_flow_id AS simpleOutFlowId, simple_out_flow_key AS simpleOutFlowKey, simple_out_flow_name AS simpleOutFlowName, batch_in_flow_id AS batchInFlowId, batch_in_flow_key AS batchInFlowKey, batch_in_flow_name AS batchInFlowName, batch_out_flow_id AS batchOutFlowId, batch_out_flow_key AS batchOutFlowKey, batch_out_flow_name AS batchOutFlowName, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, outer_sort AS outerSort, inner_sort AS innerSort, description, status, is_deleted AS isDeleted, crte_time AS crteTime, updt_time AS updtTime FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, pool_name AS poolName FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_investment_pool ( parent_id, pool_code, pool_name, pool_type, pool_level, market_codes, variety_codes, hs_pool_name, in_flow_id, in_flow_key, in_flow_name, out_flow_id, out_flow_key, out_flow_name, simple_in_flow_id, simple_in_flow_key, simple_in_flow_name, simple_out_flow_id, simple_out_flow_key, simple_out_flow_name, batch_in_flow_id, batch_in_flow_key, batch_in_flow_name, batch_out_flow_id, batch_out_flow_key, batch_out_flow_name, max_capacity, outer_sort, inner_sort, description, status, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{poolCode}, #{poolName}, #{poolType}, #{poolLevel}, #{marketCodes}, #{varietyCodes}, #{hsPoolName}, #{inFlowId}, #{inFlowKey}, #{inFlowName}, #{outFlowId}, #{outFlowKey}, #{outFlowName}, #{simpleInFlowId}, #{simpleInFlowKey}, #{simpleInFlowName}, #{simpleOutFlowId}, #{simpleOutFlowKey}, #{simpleOutFlowName}, #{batchInFlowId}, #{batchInFlowKey}, #{batchInFlowName}, #{batchOutFlowId}, #{batchOutFlowKey}, #{batchOutFlowName}, #{maxCapacity}, #{outerSort}, #{innerSort}, #{description}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{crteTime}, #{updtTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(inner_sort) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT MAX(outer_sort) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id IS NULL

SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, pool_code AS poolCode, pool_name AS poolName, pool_type AS poolType, pool_level AS poolLevel, outer_sort AS outerSort, inner_sort AS innerSort FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY outer_sort ASC, inner_sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_investment_pool SET pool_name = #{poolName}, market_codes = #{marketCodes}, variety_codes = #{varietyCodes}, hs_pool_name = #{hsPoolName}, in_flow_id = #{inFlowId}, in_flow_key = #{inFlowKey}, in_flow_name = #{inFlowName}, out_flow_id = #{outFlowId}, out_flow_key = #{outFlowKey}, out_flow_name = #{outFlowName}, simple_in_flow_id = #{simpleInFlowId}, simple_in_flow_key = #{simpleInFlowKey}, simple_in_flow_name = #{simpleInFlowName}, simple_out_flow_id = #{simpleOutFlowId}, simple_out_flow_key = #{simpleOutFlowKey}, simple_out_flow_name = #{simpleOutFlowName}, batch_in_flow_id = #{batchInFlowId}, batch_in_flow_key = #{batchInFlowKey}, batch_in_flow_name = #{batchInFlowName}, batch_out_flow_id = #{batchOutFlowId}, batch_out_flow_key = #{batchOutFlowKey}, batch_out_flow_name = #{batchOutFlowName}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, outer_sort = #{outerSort}, inner_sort = #{innerSort}, description = #{description}, updt_time = #{updtTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ip_investment_pool_evt ( id, parent_id, pool_code, pool_name, pool_type, pool_level, market_codes, variety_codes, hs_pool_name, in_flow_id, in_flow_key, in_flow_name, out_flow_id, out_flow_key, out_flow_name, simple_in_flow_id, simple_in_flow_key, simple_in_flow_name, simple_out_flow_id, simple_out_flow_key, simple_out_flow_name, batch_in_flow_id, batch_in_flow_key, batch_in_flow_name, batch_out_flow_id, batch_out_flow_key, batch_out_flow_name, max_capacity, outer_sort, inner_sort, description, status, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type ) SELECT id, parent_id, pool_code, pool_name, pool_type, pool_level, market_codes, variety_codes, hs_pool_name, in_flow_id, in_flow_key, in_flow_name, out_flow_id, out_flow_key, out_flow_name, simple_in_flow_id, simple_in_flow_key, simple_in_flow_name, simple_out_flow_id, simple_out_flow_key, simple_out_flow_name, batch_in_flow_id, batch_in_flow_key, batch_in_flow_name, batch_out_flow_id, batch_out_flow_key, batch_out_flow_name, max_capacity, outer_sort, inner_sort, description, status, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time, #{operatorId}, NOW(), #{oprtType} FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO ip_investment_pool_evt ( id, parent_id, pool_code, pool_name, pool_type, pool_level, market_codes, variety_codes, hs_pool_name, in_flow_id, in_flow_key, in_flow_name, out_flow_id, out_flow_key, out_flow_name, simple_in_flow_id, simple_in_flow_key, simple_in_flow_name, simple_out_flow_id, simple_out_flow_key, simple_out_flow_name, batch_in_flow_id, batch_in_flow_key, batch_in_flow_name, batch_out_flow_id, batch_out_flow_key, batch_out_flow_name, max_capacity, outer_sort, inner_sort, description, status, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time, opter_id, opt_time, oprt_type ) SELECT id, parent_id, pool_code, pool_name, pool_type, pool_level, market_codes, variety_codes, hs_pool_name, in_flow_id, in_flow_key, in_flow_name, out_flow_id, out_flow_key, out_flow_name, simple_in_flow_id, simple_in_flow_key, simple_in_flow_name, simple_out_flow_id, simple_out_flow_key, simple_out_flow_name, batch_in_flow_id, batch_in_flow_key, batch_in_flow_name, batch_out_flow_id, batch_out_flow_key, batch_out_flow_name, max_capacity, outer_sort, inner_sort, description, status, is_deleted, crte_time, updt_time, #{operatorId}, NOW(), #{oprtType} FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ip_investment_pool SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, pool_id AS poolId, relation_type AS relationType, relation_pool_id AS relationPoolId, relation_pool_name AS relationPoolName, sort_order AS sortOrder, remark, is_deleted AS isDeleted, crte_time AS crteTime, updt_time AS updtTime FROM ip_pool_relation WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY relation_type ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_relation SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ip_pool_relation SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}

UPDATE ip_pool_relation SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND relation_pool_id IN
#{relationPoolId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, pool_id AS poolId, rule_type AS ruleType, rule_desc AS ruleDesc, is_deleted AS isDeleted, crte_time AS crteTime, updt_time AS updtTime FROM ip_pool_auto_rule WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rule_type ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_auto_rule SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ip_pool_auto_rule SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS flowId, flow_key AS flowKey, name AS flowName FROM znty_flow.wf_flow_definition WHERE status = 'active' AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0) ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, role_name AS roleName, parent_id AS parentId, sort_order AS sortOrder, is_deleted AS isDeleted, crte_time AS crteTime, updt_time AS updtTime FROM ip_role WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, pool_id AS poolId, permission_type AS permissionType, subject_type AS subjectType, subject_id AS subjectId, subject_name AS subjectName, is_deleted AS isDeleted, crte_time AS crteTime, updt_time AS updtTime FROM ip_pool_permission WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY permission_type ASC, subject_type ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ip_pool_permission SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE pool_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE ip_pool_permission SET is_deleted = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND pool_id IN
#{poolId}
